scripts.postbuild: echo 'Build complete. Run npm run verify to check output.'
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run verify
scripts.deploy:manual: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'build: update v22' && git push
scripts.deploy:gh-pages: npm run build && git checkout gh-pages && cp -r dist/* . && git add . && git commit -m 'deploy: manual update' && git push && git checkout main
scripts.release: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
